name: Hollyland VenusLiv Live Streaming Camera
description: Capture your long-form live streams with the black VenusLiv One-Touch Live Streaming Camera from Hollyland.

features.Key Features:: 24/7 Live Streaming 1080p Camera | Horizontal & Vertical Output | 5" Touchscreen, HollyOS | RTMP, UVC, Ethernet & Wi-Fi Support | Record to SD Card, HDMI/USB-C Output | 6x Zoom Lens with 80° Field of View
features.What's in the box?: Hollyland VenusLiv One-Touch 24/7 Live Streaming Camera (Black) | 12V Power Adapter | Lens Cap | USB-A to USB-C Cable | Cable Tie | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
